_comment: Permissioned consortium / privacy chain. SidechainMode + proofType=None = the L1 anchor is a discovery + asset-bridge endpoint, NOT a settlement trust anchor; the chain's operators run their own trust model (committee multisig, KYC list, enterprise governance). External DA matches the lightest-touch storage tier; gateway off because cross-L2 messaging isn't the use case. permissionlessExit=true so participating users always have an L1 unbridge path even when consortium membership ends. See samples/README.md.
